title: Article Reviewer in the track of Robotics and Automation
description: Invited as an article reviewer for the IEEE ETCM Ecuador conference, evaluating submissions in the field of Robotics and Automation.

title: Best paper award in the track of Robotics and Automation
description: Recognition for innovative contributions at the IEEE ETCM Ecuador conference, for the paper 'Software Architecture and Simulation Interface for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles'.
